assertions.reason: The rerun matched the contract: after generateAndStoreSecret succeeds, post-provision failures trigger NativeBiometricVault.deleteSecret('enbox.wallet.root') before the original error is surfaced, and the targeted test confirms isInitialized() returns false afterward.

matchedTests: rolls back the orphan native secret when local derivation throws after provisioning succeeded
still bubbles the ORIGINAL derivation error and logs a warning when deleteSecret itself rejects
still surfaces a native-side generateAndStoreSecret failure without calling deleteSecret
evidence.observedBehavior: Targeted Jest rerun passed 3/3 partial-init recovery tests; the main assertion verified a single deleteSecret rollback call and false from isInitialized() after the rejected initialize() attempt.

commandsRun.observation: PASS: 3 targeted tests ran and passed for rollback-on-derivation-failure, original-error preservation when deleteSecret rejects, and no rollback when generateAndStoreSecret itself fails before provisioning.

frictions: validation-contract.md names `src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.initialize.test.ts`, but the authoritative local coverage for this assertion lives in the consolidated `src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts`, consistent with `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.
summary: Validated VAL-VAULT-027 on the jest-local surface; the rollback rerun passed and confirms partial initialize failures delete the orphaned native secret and leave the vault uninitialized.
